title: Employment Risk Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger employment risk foundations judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Employment Risk Foundations is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: Employment Risk Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good employment risk foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Employment Risk Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
